title: Delayed school admissions for summer-born pupils: 2025
body: "This report provides findings from 2 surveys designed to help monitor:   trends in the number of requests for delayed entry into reception for summer born children local authorities’ approach to handling requests   It also helps to understand parents’ and carers’ reasons for requesting delayed entry for their summer born children as well as their demographics and childcare arrangements.  This report provides an update to research published in 2018, 2019, 2020 and 2023.  You can find the previous reports, as well as guidance for parents and local authorities on summer-born children: research and guidance. "
